attractions.name: Monkey Point
attractions.description: Bird's eye view of the nearby cities of Chandigarh, Kalka, Panchkula and Sutlej river and visit a small Hanuman Temple with lots of Monkeys around
source_files: North India/All Inclusive Guide- Kufri, Shimla, Chandigarh.pdf
